t_ch: （尽管克拉拉会利用帕斯卡的情感智能、尽力引导帕斯卡向好，但不排除帕斯卡今后还有再次失控的可能……）
t_en: (Although Clara will use Pascal's emotional intelligence to help guide him in the right direction, Pascal could still go out of control in the future.)

t_ch: （此外，帕斯卡先前尽管没有对人造成伤害，但它确实有过盗窃行为。这点也必须纳入考虑。）
t_en: (In addition, Pascal has a history of stealing, even though he never caused any harm to anyone. This is also a major concern.)

t_ch: （问题的核心是什么？慎重思考，选择其中一种方法，然后说服另一人吧。）
t_en: (What is most important here? I need to think carefully and choose one solution, then persuade the other person.)

t_ch: 克拉拉建议将选择权托付给外来者。我尊重她的选择。
t_en: Clara proposed that you should choose, outsider. I respect her wish.

t_ch: 关于个体「帕斯卡」的处置方式，你有结论了吗？
t_en: Have you made a decision about how to handle Pascal?

t_ch: 你可以考虑下克拉拉的方案吗？
t_en: Can you give Clara's idea some thought?

t_ch: 让我再考虑一下。
t_en: I'd like to give it some more thought.

t_ch: 理解。你可以经过充分考虑后再做决定。
t_en: I understand. You can make a decision after you've thought about it more.

t_ch: 我预测到了此种可能性。说出你的想法吧。
t_en: I had anticipated this possibility. Tell me what you think.

t_ch: 它的情感智能具有研究价值。
t_en: Pascal's emotional intelligence is important for research purposes.

t_ch: 理解。过去的七百年中，从未发生过自动机兵依靠自身算力发展出情感智能的案例。「帕斯卡」这一个体确实具有研究的价值。
t_en: I understand. Over the past <unbreak>700</unbreak> years, there has never been an automaton that has developed emotional intelligence through its own computational power. Pascal is an intriguing subject worth researching.

t_ch: 但于我而言，保护人类社群人身及财产安全的优先级绝对高于上述研究。
t_en: However, in my opinion, protecting humanity's safety and property is more important than research.

t_ch: 帕斯卡和你很类似，不是吗？
t_en: Pascal is similar to you, no?

t_ch: 理解。你认为「帕斯卡」通过自身算力习得的情感智能与我并无不同。
t_en: I understand. You believe that Pascal's emotional intelligence, derived from his own computational power, is no different from mine.

t_ch: 对于人类「共情」的行为，我尚且不能进行透彻的分析。但我理解尊重这种情感的重要性。
t_en: I am currently still unable to conduct a thorough analysis of human empathy. However, I recognize the importance of respecting such emotions.

t_ch: 它没有恶意，不会伤害他人。
t_en: It has no malice and will not hurt anyone.

t_ch: 理解。敌意侦测模块目前亦无反应。
t_en: I understand. I also do not detect any hostility from him.

t_ch: 但意外系数仍然存在，无法保证该个体在未来不会再次失控，对人类社群造成损害。
t_en: However, the risk remains, and there is no guarantee that the robot will not lose control again and cause harm to humans in the future.

t_ch: 此前的结论仍然成立——该个体的故障概率及信息噪音比例仍在不断上升，未来有可能引发安全隐患。
t_en: The prior assessment remains valid. The risk of error and the amount of muddled information in this robot is increasing, and has the potential to cause future security concerns.

t_ch: 你是克拉拉信任的「变量」。无论如何，你的观点都会被纳入演算范畴。
t_en: Clara believes in you as a variable. Either way, your input will be taken into account.

t_ch: 我会持续收集意见，尝试推导出新的结果。你有其他需要补充的信息吗，外来者？
t_en: I'll keep gathering information and calculating new possibilities. Do you have any other insights, outsider?

t_ch: 你不能低估了那孩子的决心。
t_en: Clara's determination cannot be underestimated.

t_ch: 「克拉拉的决心」——该条目包含的信息难以量化，可能会导致计算阻塞。
t_en: "Clara's determination." This entry contains information that is difficult to quantify and may cause computational difficulties.

t_ch: …尽管如此，临场经验已经证实：「克拉拉的决心」往往能够化解各类纷争或困境。
t_en: Nonetheless, real experience has demonstrated that Clara's determination can often overcome all challenges.

t_ch: 「情感」是很宝贵的事物。
t_en: Emotions are priceless.

t_ch: 理解。针对此事，你与克拉拉的观点高度一致。
t_en: I understand. You and Clara both agree on this point.

t_ch: 「保护机械智能发展出的自主意识」——我会适当提高该事项的权重比例。
t_en: Protecting a consciousness created by artificial intelligence. I shall give this more consideration.

t_ch: 你不是会努力实现她的愿望吗？
t_en: You said you'd try to make Clara's wish come true.

t_ch: 在常规的人类族群中，与克拉拉年龄贴近的个体，通常不会承担过于重大的社会「责任」。
t_en: People Clara's age do not usually take on overwhelming social responsibilities.

t_ch: 为了保障克拉拉顺利成长，我始终避免让她承受过大的负担。
t_en: To ensure that Clara grows up well, I've always avoided overburdening her.

t_ch: 但如果承担「责任」是出于克拉拉本人的强烈意愿，我亦没有强行介入干涉的权力。
t_en: But if Clara insists on taking on such responsibilities, then I have no right to object.

t_ch: 无需进行更多讨论。如果你决心采用克拉拉的方案，史瓦罗基地网络将无条件配合后续行动。
t_en: There is no need to discuss this any further. If you insist on using Clara's solution, the Svarog base network will completely support you.

t_ch: 就按克拉拉说的做吧。
t_en: We'll go with Clara's idea.

t_ch: 等等…我再去劝劝克拉拉。
t_en: Wait... I should try to persuade Clara again.

t_ch: 选择权在你。我就在此处等候。
t_en: It's all up to you. I'll be waiting for you right here.

t_ch: 你做出决定了吗？
t_en: Have you decided?

t_ch: 就按克拉拉说的做吧。
t_en: We'll go with Clara's idea.

t_ch: 等等…我还是想去劝劝克拉拉。
t_en: Wait. I should persuade Clara out of it instead.

t_ch: 选择权在你。我就在此处等候。
t_en: It's all up to you. I'll be waiting for you right here.

t_ch: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}……
我们，还有帕斯卡…到底该怎么办才好？
t_en: What should we do with Pascal?

t_ch: 我还是更支持史瓦罗的方案…
t_en: I think we should go with Svarog's idea...

t_ch: 让我再考虑一下。
t_en: I'd like to give it some more thought.

t_ch: 好、好的。克拉拉也会再冷静考虑一下……
t_en: Okay. I'll think about it some more too.

t_ch: …克拉拉猜到{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}会这么说了。
t_en: *sigh* I figured you'd say that.

t_ch: 但…克拉拉想知道——{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}为什么支持史瓦罗先生的方案呢？
t_en: But I'd like to know why you went with Mr. Svarog's solution.

t_ch: 他的方案风险可控。
t_en: His solution is the safest.

t_ch: …克拉拉也明白这点。但是……
t_en: I understand that, but...

t_ch: 没必要为报废机器人付出太多。
t_en: There's no reason to make such a large commitment for a broken robot.

t_ch: 这…这是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的真实想法吗？
t_en: Do you truly believe that, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}?

t_ch: 这是对帕斯卡盗窃的惩罚。
t_en: This is Pascal's punishment for stealing.

t_ch: …克拉拉明白，做错事就要受到惩罚。可是…我觉得帕斯卡值得一个改正的机会。
t_en: I understand that crimes should be punished, but I think Pascal deserves another chance.

t_ch: 它只是希望铆钉镇的大家能平安归来…然后过上和从前一样的平静生活。
t_en: He only wants everyone to return safely to Rivet Town and live their peaceful lives like before.

t_ch: 克拉拉认为，不论是人类还是机器人，只要拥有了「情感」这种东西，就值得被善意对待。
t_en: I think that anyone with emotion should be treated with dignity, regardless of whether they are a human or robot.

t_ch: 我可以想办法，让帕斯卡不再去偷窃、不再伤害别人…克拉拉有自信能办到这件事。
t_en: I'm confident that I can prevent Pascal from stealing and harming others.

t_ch: …不过，我也明白{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的想法。克拉拉必须承认，自己做不到像史瓦罗先生那样理性，考虑事情也没有那么全面……
t_en: However, I respect your point of view. I admit I might not be as rational as Mr. Svarog, and don't think things through as much...

t_ch: 所以，可以请{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}再多说说自己的看法吗？克拉拉…想再听听更多不同的意见。
t_en: So, could you please talk more about your point of view? I'd like to hear some different perspectives.

t_ch: 它只会一遍又一遍地忘记你。
t_en: Pascal will forget you over and over.

t_ch: …虽然克拉拉说自己一定会陪着帕斯卡到最后，但其实…克拉拉也很害怕。
t_en: I said I will stay with Pascal until the end, but I'm actually scared too.

t_ch: 克拉拉不敢想象…不知道被遗忘了很多次之后，自己还能以什么样的情感面对帕斯卡……
t_en: I can't imagine it... How will I feel when I have to face Pascal after being forgotten so many times?

t_ch: 如果…如果克拉拉真的产生了放弃的念头…那该怎么办？
t_en: What if I feel like giving up? What happens then?

t_ch: 或许，趁克拉拉对帕斯卡的感情还没那么深…早点放手才是更好的选择？
t_en: Perhaps it's best to let go now, while my feelings for Pascal aren't as strong?

t_ch: 他选择了对你伤害最小的方法。
t_en: He chose the safest solution for you.

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生刚才提出的可能性…确实让克拉拉感到害怕。
t_en: Mr. Svarog's warnings about the potential risks do make me nervous.

t_ch: 克拉拉不敢想象…不知道被遗忘了很多次之后，自己还能以什么样的情感面对帕斯卡……
t_en: I can't imagine it... How will I feel when I have to face Pascal after being forgotten so many times?

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生，他已经替我考虑到这点了吗？或许克拉拉不该辜负他的心意？
t_en: Did Mr. Svarog consider that for me? Maybe I shouldn't disappoint him...

t_ch: 也许在史瓦罗先生看来，帕斯卡会伤害别人是迟早的事…所以他才一直劝克拉拉早点放手。
t_en: Mr. Svarog believes Pascal will harm someone else eventually... which is why he keeps telling me to let go.

t_ch: 人的利益应置于失控机器之上。
t_en: Human interests should take priority over machines.

t_ch: 不对，克拉拉觉得不是这样。人与机器应该平等相处…况且，史瓦罗先生不也是「机器」吗？
t_en: No, I don't think so. Humans and machines should coexist as equals. Isn't Mr. Svarog also a machine?

t_ch: 帕斯卡并不以人类利益为优先。
t_en: Pascal does not prioritize human interests.

t_ch: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}是想说…平等的前提是优先考虑他人的利益吗？
t_en: Are you trying to say... equality means you have to consider others' interests first?

t_ch: …原来是这样。也许在史瓦罗先生看来，帕斯卡会伤害别人是迟早的事…所以他才一直劝克拉拉早点放手。
t_en: I see. Maybe Mr. Svarog believes Pascal will harm someone else eventually, which is why he keeps telling me to let go.

t_ch: 可史瓦罗总会为你着想。
t_en: But Svarog cares about you.

t_ch: …的确。史瓦罗先生的出发点，从始至终都是为了克拉拉着想。
t_en: True. Mr. Svarog is always there for me.

t_ch: 也许在他看来，帕斯卡会伤害别人是迟早的事…所以他才一直劝克拉拉早点放手。
t_en: Maybe Mr. Svarog believes Pascal will harm someone else eventually, which is why he keeps telling me to let go.

t_ch: …谢谢{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，谢谢你陪我聊了这么多。这个抉择比想象中的还要残酷…但克拉拉已经做好决定了。
t_en: I appreciate you taking the time to speak with me. This decision is much harder than I expected, but I've finally made my mind up.

t_ch: 我们…就按史瓦罗先生说的来做吧。但克拉拉还会想些办法，努力挽救帕斯卡的情感和记忆……
t_en: If you feel it's necessary, we'll do what Mr. Svarog suggested... But until you're sure, I'll keep trying to find a way to save Pascal's emotions and memories...

t_ch: 如果{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}准备好做出选择了，就告诉克拉拉吧。
t_en: Tell me when you're ready to make a decision.

t_ch: 就按史瓦罗说的做吧。
t_en: Let's just do what Mr. Svarog suggested.

t_ch: 等等…我想再找史瓦罗聊聊。
t_en: Wait... I want to talk again to Svarog.

t_ch: 嗯…正好，克拉拉也需要些时间，做好心理准备。
t_en: Okay... I need some time to emotionally prepare myself anyway.

t_ch: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你的选择是……
t_en: So, what's your decision...

t_ch: 就按史瓦罗说的做吧。
t_en: Let's just do what Mr. Svarog suggested.

t_ch: 等等…我想再找史瓦罗聊聊。
t_en: Wait... I want to talk again to Svarog.

t_ch: 嗯…正好，克拉拉也需要些时间，做好心理准备。
t_en: Okay... I need some time to emotionally prepare myself anyway.

t_ch: 已经，抵达，目标！等待，进一步，指令！
t_en: Already, arrive, target! Waiting, further, instructions!

t_ch: 正在接入个体。准备备份该个体核心模组内全部信息。
t_en: Accessing. Preparing to back up all core module data.

t_ch: 拜托你了，史瓦罗先生……
t_en: Please, Mr. Svarog...

t_en: Backup complete, initializing formatting.

t_ch: （还是先暂时离开吧……）
t_en: (Let's get out of here...)

t_ch: …帕斯卡，我们回来啦。
t_en: ...Pascal, we're back.

t_ch: 帕斯卡，乖乖，等待！等待，进一步，指令！
t_en: Pascal, good, waiting! Waiting, further, instructions!

t_ch: 接下来…要拜托你乖乖听话，不要动。
t_en: Now... please be a good boy and don't move.

t_ch: 帕斯卡，为了帮你治病，我们请来了史瓦罗先生——他会帮你恢复健康的。
t_en: Pascal, we've got Mr. Svarog to help treat your illness. He'll help you recover.

t_ch: ——生病？生病，什么，是？
t_en: Illness? What, is, illness?

t_ch: 但，帕斯卡，不动！健康，恢复！
t_en: But, Pascal, not—move! Recover, health!

t_ch: 接下来就拜托你了，史瓦罗先生……
t_en: Mr. Svarog, let's get started...

t_ch: 明白。正在准备植入保护程序——
t_en: Understood. The protective programs are ready for installation...

t_ch: 希望克拉拉做出了正确的选择……
t_en: I hope I made the right decision...

t_ch: 这样就…完成了吗？
t_en: ...Is it done?

t_ch: 程序已成功植入。该个体需要进行一段时间的断电维护，暂时无法交流。我们可以稍后再来查看状况。
t_en: The programs were successfully installed. The robot will require offline maintenance and will be unable to communicate for some time. We can return to it later.

t_ch: …克拉拉明白了。那…我们就先回基地吧，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
t_en: ...I see. In that case, let's go back to the base.

t_ch: （大概是告一段落了…过后再联系克拉拉看看状况吧。）
t_en: (I think it's over... I'll check in with Clara later to see what's up.)

t_ch: 啊，是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！克拉拉想给你看的…就是这些小家伙。
t_en: Oh, it's you! I wanted to show you something... These little fellas.

t_ch: 这些机器人怎么了？
t_en: What about them?

t_ch: 中间这个大家伙，难道是……
t_en: That big one in the middle — is that...

t_ch: 没错，它…就是帕斯卡。
t_en: Yes... he's Pascal.

t_ch: 你好，你好，欢迎！好久不见，好久不见！
t_en: Hello, hello, hello! Long time no see!

t_ch: 好久不见！今天，天气，很好！
t_en: Long time no see! Today, weather, great!

t_ch: 谢谢，你！好久，不见！喜欢，{NICKNAME}，克拉拉！
t_en: Thank, you! Long time, no see! {NICKNAME} friend, Clara friend!

t_ch: 它们好像认得我？
t_en: They know who I am?

t_ch: 我好像不认识它们啊……
t_en: But I don't know them...

t_ch: 是的，这就是克拉拉说的…基地网络的怪事。
t_en: Yes, that's what I was talking about... Something strange has happened.

t_ch: 之前，在史瓦罗先生的帮助下，帕斯卡顺利完成了格式化，被纳入基地网络。可在那之后……
t_en: Mr. Svarog helped to format Pascal and integrate him into the base network, but after that...

t_ch: 克拉拉意外发现…只要我跟史瓦罗先生提到{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的名字，基地里的小家伙们就会变得格外开心。
t_en: ...I discovered that whenever I mentioned your name to Mr. Svarog, these guys at the base would get really happy.

t_ch: 而且，你看——它们好像对你特别热情！就连克拉拉也没法在初次见面时就得到大家的认可……
t_en: Look how excited they are about you! I've never met anyone for the first time that was so happy to see me...

t_ch: 克拉拉在想…是不是因为它们共享了来自帕斯卡的情感？
t_en: I was wondering... is it because they share Pascal's emotions?

t_ch: 如果是真的就太好了。
t_en: If so, that'd be fantastic.

t_ch: 是啊，就好像是…帕斯卡一直都陪在我们身边一样。
t_en: Yeah, it's like Pascal is always with us.

t_ch: 这种温暖的感觉…和以前一模一样呢。
t_en: It's a nice feeling... just like the one I had before.

t_ch: 大概只是某种故障…？
t_en: Maybe it's some kind of technical fault?

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生也这么说——他认为帕斯卡的情感智能类似某种病毒，在不知什么时候感染了连接基地网络的全部个体。
t_en: That's what Mr. Svarog said. He said Pascal's emotional intelligence was like a virus that infected the entire base network at some point.

t_ch: 「病毒」…
t_en: A virus...

t_ch: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}不用紧张，克拉拉觉得这不是件坏事。因为……
t_en: Don't worry, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}. I don't think it's a bad thing, because...

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生没有选择清除这种「病毒」——这不就是最好的证明吗？
t_en: ...Mr. Svarog chose not to get rid of it. Isn't that the most convincing proof?

t_ch: 帕斯卡，真乖～
t_en: Good boy, Pascal!

t_ch: …啊，是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！克拉拉正在对帕斯卡做例行检查呢。
t_en: ...Oh, it's you! I'm just doing a checkup on Pascal.

t_ch: 帕斯卡最近没有出问题吧？
t_en: How has Pascal been recently?

t_ch: 看起来没有…史瓦罗先生的保护程序非常有效。只是不知道以后会发生什么……
t_en: He's been doing great — Mr. Svarog's programs are extremely effective... It's just hard to know if it will last...

t_ch: 啊…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}难得来一趟，要不要和帕斯卡聊聊天？
t_en: Would you like to speak with Pascal?

t_ch: 呃…你还好吗？
t_en: Uhh... How are you doing?

t_ch: 我，我，我！很，好！
t_en: I, I, I! Very, good!

t_ch: 你最近都在做什么？
t_en: What have you been up to recently?

t_ch: 帕斯卡，执行，任务，来自克拉拉！
t_en: Pascal, carry out, Clara, mission!

t_ch: 保护，铆钉镇！等待，大家，回来，生活！
t_en: Protect, Rivet Town! Waiting, everybody, come back, live, together!

t_ch: 你没有又去偷东西吧？
t_en: You haven't been stealing anymore, have you?

t_ch: 没有，帕斯卡！克拉拉，说，错误，偷窃！
t_en: No, Pascal! Clara, say, wrong, stealing!

t_ch: 帕斯卡，不会，偷窃，再！执行，克拉拉，任务！
t_en: Pascal, not, again, steal! Carry out, Clara, mission!

t_ch: 看到你过得不错，我就放心了。
t_en: I'm glad to see you're doing well.

t_ch: 谢谢，{NICKNAME}！你，生活，愉快！帕斯卡，开心！
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}! Your, life, happy! Pascal, happy!

t_ch: 它说话还是老样子啊。
t_en: He's still talking a little funny.

t_ch: 啊…克拉拉也尝试过维修帕斯卡的逻辑语言中枢，我还特意加装了新的芯片。
t_en: Oh, I tried to fix Pascal's language module by installing a new chip.

t_ch: 但…似乎没有起到什么效果。不过，考虑到这样也不影响交流…克拉拉就先让帕斯卡保持原状了。
t_en: ...It didn't seem to make much difference though. Still, at least we can understand what he's saying... I'll leave him alone for now.

t_ch: 不、不太，运行，不太、顺利，很，很抱歉！
t_en: Not, not quite, running, smoothly! Very, apologies!

t_ch: 总之，帕斯卡现在的状态还算健康。今天的例行检查也基本完成了…我们就先回去吧？
t_en: Hehe, you're in good health, Pascal. Today's checkup is over — shall we head back now?

t_ch: 请等一下——
t_en: Please wait...

t_ch: 花、花、花，给你，别丢了。
t_en: Flower, flower, flower, for you — don't forget.
...Huh?

t_ch: 帕斯卡，自己，自己做！废弃，零件，材料！不是，偷的，很干净。
t_en: Pascal, make, make myself! Scraps, parts, materials! Not stolen, very clean.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，好人！帕斯卡，高兴！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, good! Pascal, happy!

t_ch: 谢谢，谢谢！谢谢，克拉拉，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Thank you, thank you! Thank you, Clara, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: …谢谢你，帕斯卡。
t_en: ...Thank you, Pascal.

t_ch: 那…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，这朵花就送给你吧？
t_en: Umm... {F#big sister}{M#big brother}, would you like a flower?

t_ch: （这个选择恐怕会直接影响此事的结果…慎重考虑后再做决定吧。）
t_en: (My choice will have a direct impact on the outcome... I should mull it over.)

t_ch: （沉默）
t_en: (Remain Silent)

t_ch: （抚摸帕斯卡）
t_en: (Strokes Pascal)

t_ch: （抱紧帕斯卡）
t_en: (Holds Pascal tightly)

t_ch: 戒备森严啊…想溜进去怕是没戏了。希露瓦，是你智取的时候啦。
t_en: They've jacked up security alright... how the heck are we gonna sneak in? Serval, we need one of those brainwaves.

t_ch: 好，交给姐姐我吧。你们跟紧点，别露馅了。
t_en: Leave it to me. Stick close guys, and don't get spotted.

t_ch: 前方军事重地，闲人不得入内！
t_en: This is a military base. Trespassers aren't allowed in.

t_ch: 等等，这是…欸，这不是希露瓦大姐头吗？好久不见！
t_en: Wait, isn't that... Ah! Serval! Long time no see!

t_ch: 哟，这不是弗朗兹嘛！好久不见，你怎么还在看大门啊？
t_en: Well, if it isn't Franz, long time no see! You're still watching the entrance?

t_ch: 这…这话我没法接呀，希露瓦大姐头还是这么犀利……
t_en: Well you see, I... Bah, you haven't changed Serval. Still nailing us to the wall...

t_ch: 那个…这么晚了，您来这边干嘛？后面这几个是谁？
t_en: So... what brings you over here at this hour? And who are the guys behind you?

t_ch: 我老弟说禁区的能源管线出故障了，挺要命的。他又信不过外包的维修工…只好请我来打白工咯。
t_en: My brother said the restricted zone energy lines were malfunctioning — told me it was urgent. He doesn't trust those contracted maintenance workers... so he got me in for free.

t_ch: 这几个是我的助手，我们要把这里的设备都检修一遍。
t_en: These guys are my assistants. We need to overhaul all the installations here.

t_ch: 那个…我没听说管线有问题啊……
t_en: Uh... I didn't hear anything about the energy lines malfunctioning...

t_ch: 拜托，这是技术部门的事，你守门的知道了能干嘛？行了，快让我进去吧。要是半夜供暖出了问题，冻死人了你负责吗？
t_en: Oh please, this is a Technology Division issue. Why would they tell you guys? Come on, let us in already. If the heating system goes down in the middle of the night, are you gonna be responsible for all the frozen corpses?

t_ch: 不不不，我负担不起……
t_en: N—No, that's uh, not something I could handle...

t_ch: 既然是杰帕德戍卫官的姐姐…应该没问题吧？
t_en: Seeing as you're Captain Gepard's sister, it should be fine...

t_ch: 好吧，这是临时的访客证，您拿好了…呃，出来的时候记得还给我啊！
t_en: Okay, here are some temporary passes... Oh, and remember to give them back to me when you leave.

t_ch: 谢啦，弗朗兹。找机会我跟老弟美言几句，让他提拔提拔你！
t_en: Thanks, Franz. I'll put in a good word for you with my brother and get him to promote you!

t_ch: 不要啊，杰帕德长官最厌恶走后门，您提都别提我，就是最好的美言了……
t_en: No, no, Captain Gepard hates all that under-the-table stuff. I'd have a better chance if you don't mention me at all...

t_ch: 你们戴的是…临时证？
t_en: Hmm... Are those... temporary passes?

t_ch: 这证好久没见过了啊…禁区基本没有外人。
t_en: I haven't seen one of those for a long time. Hmm... The restricted zone virtually never allows outsiders in.

t_ch: 抱歉，我在值岗，没空聊闲天。
t_en: Sorry, I'm on duty, no time to chat.

t_ch: 有什么事的话，去找警卫队长汇报吧。
t_en: If there's an issue, report to the security captain.

t_ch: 你们不是来做检修的吗？怎么在这里乱晃？
t_en: Aren't you the maintenance people? What are you doing over here?

t_ch: 禁区内不得随意走动！快去干活！
t_en: You can't just go wherever you please in the restricted zone! Get to work!

t_ch: 听说城里最近在通缉捉拿重案犯，甚至调了批铁卫回去。
t_en: I heard that there's an arrest warrant out in the city for some major criminals — they even recalled some of the Guards.

t_ch: 真不消停啊。前线的战况够吃紧的了，后方还出问题……
t_en: It never ends. Things are bad enough on the front line without things going south behind us...

t_ch: 还好有杰帕德戍卫官在，听说重案犯之前是被他抓住的。
t_en: At least Captain Gepard's here, they say he captured the fugitives once already.

t_ch: 「机械热潮」又发新歌了，你听过了吗？
t_en: ...Mechanical Fever released a new song. Did you hear it?

t_ch: 听了，这次让佩拉做了主唱，吓我一跳。风格完全不一样了。
t_en: Sure did, Pela was on lead vocals this time, scared me half to death. It's a completely different style.

t_ch: 「机械热潮」也要转型了吗…唉，摇滚已死，没有受众了啊。
t_en: Even Mechanical Fever is changing... *sigh* Rock 'n' roll's dead, there's no audience anymore.

t_ch: 别这么悲观，偶尔换个口味罢了。我觉得佩拉也不错。
t_en: Don't be so pessimistic. They're just keeping things fresh. I thought Pela was pretty good.

t_ch: 马利克下周也要调走了，你听说了吗？最近前线和城里好像都很缺人手。
t_en: Hmm-hmm... Did you hear Mallick is being reassigned? It seems like both the front line and the city are shorthanded right now.

t_ch: 真的假的？马利克刚升职没几天吧？不可能调他啊。
t_en: Seriously? No way. I thought Mallick had only just been promoted?

t_ch: 总感觉有什么大事要发生了，神神秘秘的。
t_en: Mysterious. It feels like something big's about to go down.

t_ch: 调哪都行，别上前线就好…我刚入伍一年，可不想把小命丢了啊。
t_en: As long as it's away from the front line, I'd happily be reassigned... It's only been a year since I enlisted — I'm not ready to lose my life.

t_ch: 能不能有点出息，在后备队混吃等死能「存护」谁？我们铁卫是为了保护贝洛伯格人民而存在的！
t_en: Ahh, you make it sound terrible. Good luck "preserving" anything with those idlers in the reserve units. Our purpose as Silvermane Guards is to protect the citizens of Belobog.

t_ch: 我知道你们中有些混子，觉得后备队每天就是游手好闲，混吃等死。告诉你们，这种想法大错特错！
t_en: I'm aware that there are those among you who see the reserve units as a vacation. Well let me set one thing straight: You are gravely mistaken!

t_ch: 在这禁区，前有裂界怪物虎视眈眈，后要提防渗透城市的阴谋团体——
t_en: This is the restricted zone. The Fragmentum before you conceals monsters that watch your every move. Behind us, we have a band of conspirators that have infiltrated the city...

t_ch: 到了情势危急的时候——现在放松散漫的家伙就会被两面夹击，丢掉小命！
t_en: The situation is critical... The lazy and undisciplined among you will lose your lives to the forces surrounding us!

t_ch: 所以从今天开始，每天训练增加两百次卧推，外加三十分钟的单手平板支撑！听明白了吗？
t_en: As such, starting from today, we will be adding <unbreak>200</unbreak> bench presses and <unbreak>30</unbreak> extra minutes of one-arm planks to our daily drill! Is that clear?

t_ch: 明白，长官！
t_en: Yes, sir!

t_ch: 看到中间那座机械栈桥了吗？穿过那座桥，对面就是人间地狱。
t_en: Do you see that mechanical gear bridge? When you cross over to the other side, you arrive at hell on earth.

t_ch: 对面有什么？
t_en: So what exactly is on the other side?

t_ch: 望不到边际的裂界，一群疲惫的银鬃铁卫，还有…弥漫着死亡味道的空气。
t_en: An endless Fragmentum, a few exhausted Silvermane Guards... and the stench of death in the air.

t_ch: 这个世界的「地狱」长什么样？
t_en: And what's this "hell" like exactly?

t_ch: 嗯…大概是个冰雪覆盖，冷到让人受不了的地方吧？做科研工作的人才没时间细想这些。
t_en: Hm... It's a place too cold to bear, covered in snow and ice. The guys doing the scientific research don't have time to worry about the surroundings.

t_ch: 这座栈桥对面就是禁区的前线，那里有望不到边际的裂界，一群疲惫的银鬃铁卫，还有…弥漫着死亡味道的空气。
t_en: The restricted zone front line is on the other side of the gear bridge. It's an endless Fragmentum with a few exhausted Silvermane Guards... and the stench of death in the air.

t_ch: 追随克里珀的筑城者也信地狱？
t_en: The Architects follow Qlipoth. Do they believe in hell?

t_ch: 没错。筑城者认为地狱在每个世界都可能存在，是一种若不介入则必然降临的状态。
t_en: They do. The Architects believe that hell can exist on any world — a plight that will inevitably come to be without intervention.

t_ch: 未来，某种可怕的灾难将会到来，若不在「存护」克里珀的指引下铸造墙壁，灾难就会席卷群星，让每个世界都沦为地狱。
t_en: In the future, a terrible catastrophe will arrive. If, under Qlipoth the Preservation's guidance, we fail to construct a barrier, that catastrophe will sweep away the stars, plunging all worlds into hell.

t_ch: 这就是筑城者的信念…而对于我们而言，地狱就是望不到边际的裂界，一群疲惫的银鬃铁卫，还有…弥漫着死亡味道的空气。
t_en: That's the belief of the Architects... but for us, hell is an endless Fragmentum, a few exhausted Silvermane Guards... and the stench of death in the air.

t_ch: 想继续向北方前进的话，就必须穿过那片「地狱」。你们准备好了吗？
t_en: If we want to progress further north, we will need to cross that hell. Are you ready?

t_ch: 都已经到这儿了…
t_en: We've come this far...

t_ch: 就是，已经没有撤退的余地啦。
t_en: Exactly, we've got nowhere left to retreat.

t_ch: 克服不了困难，谈什么开拓。
t_en: Without hardships to overcome, there is no trailblazing.

t_ch: 说得好！台词很帅嘛！
t_en: Right on! I'm stealing that!

t_ch: 撤退永远不嫌晚…
t_en: It's never too late to retreat...

t_ch: 都这时候了，你可不许给我打退堂鼓啊！
t_en: Look how far we've come! Don't chicken out on us now.

t_ch: 那就走吧，先想个办法到桥对岸去。
t_en: Haha, let's go then. First, we need to think of a way to get to the other side.

t_ch: 我参与过这种栈桥的底层逻辑编写，它是靠几台终端机联合控制的。我们去找找。
t_en: I helped set the underlying mechanisms for this type of gear bridge. It's controlled via different terminals in combination. Let's go find them.
Argh...

t_ch: 不行…这台终端下线了，从这里操控不了。
t_en: Nope... this terminal is offline, we can't control it from here.

t_ch: 那该怎么办？
t_en: So what's the plan?

t_ch: 再找找别的吧，栈桥联结的每个平台应该都有类似的终端。
t_en: Look for another — every platform linked to the gear bridge should have a similar terminal.

t_ch: …不行，启动不了。看来终端的能源被人为切断了。
t_en: ...Darn, can't activate it. It seems like someone's severed the energy supply to the terminals.

t_ch: 是有人在故意捣乱吗？
t_en: So someone's deliberately trying to create trouble?

t_ch: 不，不对——我又仔细想了一下，这可能是故意的安排。
t_en: I... huh. Y'know, the more I think about it, the more it seems deliberate.

t_ch: 是银鬃铁卫有意为之？
t_en: Are the Guards doing this intentionally?

t_ch: 我仔细想了一下，确实有这个可能。
t_en: I was just thinking that, we can't rule it out.

t_ch: 是我们干的？
t_en: Did we do this?

t_ch: 你清醒一点…
t_en: What are you talking about...?

t_ch: 这应该是铁卫有意为之。
t_en: I think the Guards must have done this intentionally.

t_ch: 在前线戒备期间，把栈桥调转到不贯通前后方的位置，然后从后方切断栈桥终端的能源，避免误操作…或者出现逃兵的可能。
t_en: With the front line on high alert, they must have rotated the bridge to make it impassable. Then they cut off the energy supply to the terminals to avoid accidental repositioning... or to prevent deserters from escaping.

t_ch: 这样做的话，即使前线溃败…裂界的怪物也无法通过栈桥渗透后方。
t_en: That way, even if the front line were to collapse... the Fragmentum monsters wouldn't be able to make it to the other side.

t_ch: 破釜沉舟…
t_en: They cut off their only retreat...

t_ch: 太残酷了。
t_en: That's terrible.

t_ch: 高明的战术。
t_en: Wise tactics.

t_ch: 布洛妮娅说的是真的…银鬃铁卫确实为了保护贝洛伯格拼上了性命。
t_en: Bronya was right... The Silvermane Guards really are risking their lives to protect Belobog.

t_ch: 推测而已，不过…八九不离十吧。老弟说过，为了抵御裂界的怪物，他们不得不动用了一些极端手段。
t_en: Just my conjecture, but I doubt it's far from the truth. My brother mentioned that they've had to use extreme measures to repel the Fragmentum monsters.

t_ch: 接着前进吧，两台终端都启动不了，咱们得去找源头的供能设备了。
t_en: Let's press on. We can't activate either of these terminals, so let's look for the energy supply installation itself.

t_ch: 就是它！那个像大铁丸子一样的东西。
t_en: That's it! The thing shaped like a giant iron ball.

t_ch: 居然隔着一道门，怎么这么麻烦……
t_en: And it's behind a gate. What are the odds...

t_ch: 它的学名叫「机关能源中枢」，连着那么多管线，恐怕整个铁卫禁区的能源都是这一台设备供能的。
t_en: Its formal name is the "mechanism energy hub." It's connected to all the energy lines — I would've thought it covers the entire restricted zone.

t_ch: 嗯…难怪守卫森严。
t_en: Mm... no wonder it's so heavily guarded.

t_ch: 一台机器掌管所有？这会出事的。我们已经吃过教训了。
t_en: One unit for everything? That's a disaster waiting to happen — we learned the hard way.

t_ch: 只要获得这台设备的权限，我们就能操作机关栈桥的终端。
t_en: As long as we can gain access permissions to the hub, we can operate the gear bridge terminals.

t_ch: 动静会不会太大…
t_en: Won't this cause a commotion...?

t_ch: 铁卫不会怀疑吗？
t_en: Won't the Guards get suspicious?

t_ch: 所以我才跟守门的说，我们是来做紧急检修的呀！除了后方，前线肯定也有需要维护的设备吧？
t_en: That's why I told them we were here for urgent maintenance! The front line equipment needs servicing just as much as the rest.

t_ch: 原来如此，不愧是你！我还以为那是你现编的呢。
t_en: So that's why you went for maintenance, way to go Serval! I thought you just came up with it on the spot.

t_ch: 走，去问问那个铁卫，看他能不能让我们进去。
t_en: Come on, let's see if that guard over there will let us past.

t_ch: 哟！晚上好，大兵！
t_en: Yo! Evening, soldier!

t_ch: 你们就是来做紧急检修的工程师？我看你们在附近晃悠有一阵了，查出问题了吗？
t_en: Are you the emergency engineers? I saw you guys hanging around. Did you find the problem?

t_ch: 没有，目前为止一切正常。我推测问题出在「能源中枢」上。
t_en: Not yet, everything looks normal so far. I think the problem is stemming from the energy hub.

t_ch: 请让我们进去做个例行维护检查。我参与过这种设备的迭代……
t_en: If you let us in we can do a routine service inspection... I've worked on various iterations of this type of installation...

t_ch: 不行！没有警卫队长的密钥，谁也不能接近能源中枢。
t_en: Haha, no, no, no, no... No can do! No one gets near the energy hub without the security captain's encryption key.

t_ch: 大守护者来了也不行？
t_en: Uh, not even the supreme guardian?

t_ch: 大守护…别抖机灵！没有密钥，谁也不能接近！
t_en: The supreme guardian...? Hey, no games, y'hear? No dice without the encryption key!

t_ch: 糟了，他是个聪明人……
t_en: Darn, this guy's not stupid...

t_ch: 你要求「密钥」对吧？我该去找哪位「队长」？
t_en: You need the encryption key, right? Which captain should I bother then?

t_ch: 邓恩队长在前面休息，你们自己去找他吧。要是他同意授权你们，我自然放行。
t_en: ...Captain Dunn's resting up ahead. Go and find him. If he grants you permission, I won't stand in your way.

t_ch: 邓恩…邓恩？嗐，你早说啊！得了得了，那没事了——我们回头再来找你。
t_en: Dunn... Dunn? Ha, why didn't you say so! No problem. We'll be back in a bit.

t_ch: 听说，杰帕德派了工程师来做紧急检修？
t_en: I heard Gepard sent mechanics for an emergency repair?

t_ch: 和守门的弗朗兹确认过了，确实有这档事。
t_en: Yes, I confirmed it with Franz.

t_ch: 我全天都守在这里，怎么没听说有什么设备需要紧急检修？
t_en: I've been keeping watch here all day, why didn't I hear about any equipment in need of emergency servicing?

t_ch: 弗朗兹说，来的人是杰帕德戍卫官的亲姐姐……
t_en: I heard from Franz that it's Captain Gepard's sister...

t_ch: 希、希露瓦？！
t_en: S—Serval!?

t_ch: 见鬼，我都两天没洗澡了——我身上有味道吗？
t_en: ...You gotta be kidding me, I haven't showered in two days... do I smell?

t_ch: …没、没有，长官！
t_en: ...N—No, sir!

t_ch: 哟，邓恩！好久不见了——你都当上警卫队长了啊？
t_en: Hey, Dunn! It's been a while. I didn't know you made security captain.

t_ch: 希、希露瓦，好久不见…你还是那么…咳，你气色不错。
t_en: S—Serval, it's been a long time... you're still so... Ahem. You look good.

t_ch: 介绍一下，这几位是我的助手，帮我分担机械屋的工作。
t_en: Allow me to introduce my assistants to you. They help me take care of business at the workshop.

t_ch: 各位，认识下我的老朋友——邓恩队长。他以前可是我乐队的王牌键盘手。
t_en: Everyone, this is Captain Dunn, an old friend of mine. He used to be an ace on the keys in the band.

t_ch: 哦？这位铁卫大哥也玩摇滚吗？你好！
t_en: Oh? You play rock 'n' roll too? Cool!

t_ch: 幸会。
t_en: Pleased to meet you.

t_ch: 请多关照。
t_en: Great seeing you.

t_ch: 哦，你们好……
t_en: Oh, hello...

t_ch: 总觉得有一股奇怪的味道……
t_en: *sniff* What's that weird smell...

t_ch: 有股一言难尽的味道……
t_en: Something smells weird...

t_ch: 哼，咳！萨克雷，你几天没洗澡了？
t_en: Hmm? *cough* Zackery, how many days has it been since you showered?

t_ch: 啊…啊？我轮岗之前才刚——
t_en: Uh... I showered right before my shift—

t_ch: …嗯？再说一遍？
t_en: Hmm? What did you say?

t_ch: …报、报告长官，两天没洗了！
t_en: ...I—I haven't showered in two days, sir!

t_ch: 真不像话，在访客面前岂能如此失礼！抱歉，让你们见笑了。
t_en: Unacceptable, especially in front of visitors! Apologies for the embarrassment, all.

t_ch: 没事儿，邓恩。对了，有机会的话，我们再上台合奏一次？
t_en: It's not a big deal, Dunn. Y'know, if you get a chance, would you wanna get on stage with us again?

t_ch: 我现在的键盘手也不赖，但还是怀念在部队里玩乐队的时光啊……
t_en: My keyboard guy is pretty good, but I still miss our military days playing in the band...

t_ch: 都是陈年往事了，希露瓦，我都好久没碰黑白键了。再说，我现在一年到头守在禁区里，怕是没什么机会回城了。
t_en: That was a long time ago, Serval — I haven't touched a keyboard in ages. Besides, I'm stationed here all year round, I'm afraid I don't get many chances to return to the city.

t_ch: 这么说有点见外…但你找我有事吗？要是没检查出什么情况，赶紧回城吧。这里不安全。
t_en: Though I don't stand on ceremony... How may I assist you? If everything's in order, you'd better head back to the city. It's not safe here.

t_ch: 管线我都检查过一遍了，似乎没什么大问题。就剩「机关能源中枢」还没排查过了。
t_en: I've checked the lines, there don't seem to be any major problems. All that's left is the energy hub.

t_ch: 那边的卫兵说，需要「密钥」才能打开闸门。能帮个忙吗？
t_en: The guard over there said that I needed an "encryption key" to open the gate. Can you help me out?

t_ch: 我们排查完就离开。
t_en: We'll be on our way after we run a check-up.

t_ch: 不要在喜欢的人面前犹豫不决。
t_en: Don't be hesitant in front of your dream girl.

t_ch: 太直接了吧你？！
t_en: Could you be any less discreet!?

t_ch: 怎么了，邓恩？
t_en: Anything wrong, Dunn?

t_ch: 抱歉，希露瓦…我能问问，杰帕德戍卫官是怎么和你说的吗？
t_en: Sorry, Serval... but can you tell me what Captain Gepard told you?

t_ch: 啊？啊…我回忆一下…「老姐，禁区的能源管线出了故障，吃干饭的外包维修商根本查不出问题」——大概就是这样吧……
t_en: Huh? Oh, uh... Let me think... "Hey sis, the energy supply lines in the restricted zone have malfunctioned. Those useless engineers can't find the problem." Something like that...

t_ch: 我能再问问…他是什么时候联系你的？
t_en: And may I ask... when did he contact you?

t_ch: 呃…今天早上？对，就是早上。他今天不是负责城区巡逻嘛？所以就顺路来委托我了。
t_en: Uh... this morning? Yeah, that's right. He's on urban patrol duty today, right? That's why he popped round and asked the favor.

t_ch: 杰帕德长官刚刚回到前线。要不…我再跟他确认一遍吧？
t_en: Captain Gepard just returned to the front line. I could... reconfirm with him?

t_ch: …欸？等会儿等会儿，他已经回来了？不可能吧，他早些时候还在城里……
t_en: ...Hah? Hold up, he's back? That can't be, he was still in the city a little while ago...

t_ch: 希露瓦…你还是跟从前一样，不擅长说谎啊。
t_en: *sigh* You haven't changed Serval... You're still a lousy liar.

t_ch: 你带来的这些人，其实不是机械屋的助手吧？
t_en: These people you've brought, they're... they're not workshop assistants, right?

t_ch: 希露瓦，不是我不想帮你…但是你要时刻记住，我可是贝洛伯格的银鬃铁卫！
t_en: Serval, it's not that I don't want to help you... but you should remember that I'm a Belobog Silvermane Guard!

t_ch: 这样，你先回去，这件事我不会跟任何人说…但是这些「外来者」必须留下！
t_en: How about this. You can leave and I won't tell anyone about this incident... But the outsiders must remain.

t_ch: 交涉失败了。
t_en: There goes the negotiation.

t_ch: 希露瓦，你先走吧。
t_en: Serval, you should go.

t_ch: 抱歉，把你卷进来。
t_en: Sorry for getting you involved in this.

t_ch: 结果还是要开打嘛…
t_en: Looks like this is gonna end in a fight after all...

t_ch: 是我把你们带到这里来的，我会跟你们并肩作战。
t_en: I brought you guys here, and I'm standing with you till the end!

t_ch: 事关贝洛伯格——不，事关整个世界的命运。邓恩，不要拦着我们——
t_en: Dunn, this concerns the fate of Belobog — no — the fate of our whole world. Please don't stand in our way...

t_ch: 希露瓦！我们过去每天都一起排练，你应该懂的吧？
t_en: Serval! We used to rehearse together every day. You must understand?

t_ch: 我的摇滚灵魂，就是维护身为军人的尊严啊！
t_en: My rock 'n' roll soul is to uphold the dignity of a soldier!

t_ch: 他们是危险人物，大守护者在通缉他们！希露瓦，你别上当！
t_en: Serval, these are dangerous individuals, the supreme guardian has sent out a warrant for their arrest! Don't let them fool you!

t_ch: 我知道自己在做什么，邓恩！你让开吧。
t_en: I know what I'm doing, Dunn! Step aside.

t_ch: …对不起，希露瓦。别怪我！
t_en: ...I'm sorry, Serval. Forgive me!

t_ch: 希露瓦…为什么……
t_en: Serval... why...

t_ch: 邓恩…抱歉，你就先小睡一会儿吧。
t_en: I'm sorry Dunn... Time for a little nap.

t_ch: 只是暂时晕过去了，不用太担心。
t_en: He's just unconscious. Don't worry.

t_ch: 死板的家伙…但很能打。「地火」缺的就是这种人。
t_en: Stubborn fool... strong, though. Wildfire lacks people like him.

t_ch: 找到了，这就是「密钥」！快，趁还没引起注意，我们——
t_en: Got it, the encryption key! Quick, before we attract attention, let's—

t_ch: 现在引起注意了……
t_en: I think we attracted attention...

t_ch: 这是敌袭警报…整个后备区的铁卫都要和我们为敌了。
t_en: That's the enemy attack alarm... Every Silvermane Guard in the reserve zone just became our enemy.

t_ch: 上啊，打败他们！
t_en: Come on, let's take them out!

t_ch: 齐心合力突围吧！
t_en: If we work together we can break through their ranks!

t_ch: 我的人生虽然短暂…
t_en: My life was short, but it was a life filled with—

t_ch: 还早着呢，别放弃得这么快啊！
t_en: You're not dead yet. How can you give up that easily!?

t_ch: 都走到这里了…就算摔折胳膊再赔上条腿，我也要见到「星核」。
t_en: We've made it up till now... I could lose an arm and a leg for all I care — I have to lay eyes on the Stellaron.

t_ch: 走，回能源中枢——谁敢挡路，就给他点颜色瞧瞧！
t_en: Quick, back to the energy supply hub. Anyone that tries to stop us is gonna find out a thing or two.

t_ch: 给我一点时间……
t_en: Give me some time...

t_ch: 可恶，这操作系统谁设计的啊，这么繁琐！
t_en: Ugh, who designed this operating system! It's so unintuitive!

t_ch: 「应急消防疏散系统」…肯定不是这个……
t_en: Emergency Fire Evacuation System... Not that...

t_ch: 「舞池摇滚氛围模式」…这谁加的？还用我的歌！
t_en: Rock 'n' Roll Dance Floor Atmosphere Mode... Who the heck added that!? And they used one of my songs!

t_ch: 「机关栈桥控制终端」——哈，还不是让我找到了！
t_en: Gear Bridge Control Terminal — ha, still found it!

t_ch: 搞定，能源系统已经重新上线了！去操作栈桥终端吧。
t_en: That's it, I've reset the energy system! Let's go and operate the gear bridge terminal.

t_ch: 小心！前面有个大家伙。
t_en: Careful! There's a big guy up ahead.

t_ch: 没有别的路…只能正面应战了。
t_en: There's no other way... We'll have to fight.

t_ch: 哼，我们连史瓦罗都赢过，还会怕它不成？上吧！
t_en: Hmph, if we can beat Svarog, we can beat this one. Let's go!

t_ch: 能源供应恢复…系统上线…开启验证…快点，快点！
t_en: Energy restored... system online... certification enabled... come on, come on!

t_ch: 百分之四十…六十五…八十五……
t_en: <unbreak>40%</unbreak>... <unbreak>65%</unbreak>... <unbreak>85%</unbreak>...

t_ch: 哈，总算好了！这下我们有操作栈桥的权限了，动作快！
t_en: Phew! We did it! We've gained access to the gear bridge. Let's move.

t_ch: 成了！走吧，咱们该去前线了。
t_en: Perfect! Okay, we need to get to the front line.

t_ch: …没问题吗？令弟可能也在那里。
t_en: ...We could have a problem. Your brother may be there.

t_ch: 大概吧…遇不到是最好，要是碰上了，就只能试着跟他谈谈了……
t_en: He probably is... Hopefully, we don't bump into him, but if we do, we'll just have to try and talk to him...

t_ch: 你有把握说服他吗？
t_en: Are you sure you can convince him?

t_ch: 把握，不到三成吧。
t_en: I've probably got a <unbreak>30%</unbreak> chance, or less.

t_ch: …那就是还有动武的可能性了。
t_en: ...Meaning it could end in a fight.

t_ch: 你没发现我们不管想说服谁，结果都是要打一顿吗？
t_en: Haven't you noticed yet? Most of our "convincing" ends in a fight.

t_ch: 容我确认一下，希露瓦。如果我们和令弟无法达成一致——你会站在我们这边吗？
t_en: We need to be sure, Serval. If we can't reach a common understanding with your brother... will you stand with us?

t_ch: …那当然，姐姐我言出必行。既然承诺了要跟你们站到最后，我绝对不会食言。
t_en: ...Of course. My word is my bond. I said that I'd stand with you to the end, and I won't go back on that promise.

t_ch: 姐姐…真的是你。
t_en: Serval... it really is you.

t_ch: 等等，杰帕德！听我说——
t_en: Wait, Gepard! Listen to me—

t_ch: 哨卫向我报告的时候，我还在想这其中是不是有什么误会。也许是入侵者挟持了你，也许你进入禁区和警报完全无关。但……
t_en: When the sentry reported to me, I thought there must have been a misunderstanding. The enemy alarm had to be unrelated to your entry into the restricted zone — perhaps the intruders had taken you hostage. And yet...

t_ch: 姐姐，离开入侵者，慢慢走到我身后来。你和他们不一样。
t_en: Step away from the intruders, Serval. Walk over slowly and stand behind me. You're different from them.

t_ch: 抱歉，老弟——我说好了要站在他们这边。
t_en: I'm sorry... we have an understanding. I stand with them.

t_ch: 给我几分钟时间，只要几分钟，我会解释清楚——
t_en: Give me a few minutes, just a few. I'll explain every—

t_ch: ——别说了，希露瓦！
t_en: Enough, Serval!

t_ch: 这是什么地方，你应该很清楚，不是吗？朗道家族最熟悉的就是这里，它是抵御裂界的最前线，守护贝洛伯格安宁的核心要塞。
t_en: Have you forgotten where we are? We Landaus ought to know this place better than anywhere... The outer reaches of the front line against the Fragmentum, Belobog's most strategic protective fortress.

t_ch: 这里的银鬃铁卫，这里的每一个人，都做好了随时为人民牺牲的觉悟——时刻准备好为贝洛伯格抛洒热血……
t_en: Every Silvermane Guard here, every person here, is ready to sacrifice themselves, ready to spill their blood for Belobog at a moment's notice...

t_ch: 而你带领这群罪犯冲入禁区，伤害铁卫兄弟，劫持能源中枢…事到如今仍然执迷不悟…你对得起朗道这个姓氏吗？
t_en: Yet here you are leading fugitives into the restricted zone, attacking my Silvermane comrades-in-arms, hijacking the energy hub... Are you really worthy of the Landau name?

t_ch: 你以为我为什么要出现在这里？我们找到了驱散寒潮、封印裂界的办法，那可能是这个世界的最后一线生机！
t_en: Why do you think I've come here? We've found a way to dispel the Eternal Freeze, to seal the Fragmentum. It might be the only lifeline this world has left!

t_ch: 若当真如此，为什么不禀报可可利亚大人？为什么偷偷摸摸混入禁区，制造混乱？！
t_en: If that were true, why wouldn't you report to Madam Cocolia? Why would you sneak into the restricted zone and create chaos!?

t_ch: 你不明白，阻止我们接近真相的人…就是可可利亚。
t_en: You don't understand. The one preventing us from getting close to the truth... is Cocolia herself.

t_ch: 你和那边的三个人都亲自见过大守护者，既然她不认可你们的说法，岂能擅作主张！
t_en: ...You have all seen the supreme guardian in person. Do you think you can act as you please because she didn't recognize your version of events!?

t_ch: 听我说，杰帕德！裂界的诞生和蔓延与「星核」有关，筑城者记录中的那颗陨星，它——
t_en: Listen to me, Gepard! The origin and spread of the Fragmentum is linked to the Stellaron. The meteorite in the Architects' records, it's—

t_ch: 我知道「星核」，你身后那几个犯人就是为它而来，但守护者大人已经对我说出了真相！这几人别有用心，想要偷窃筑城者的宝物。
t_en: I know about the Stellaron. It's exactly what the fugitives behind you are seeking. But the Madam Guardian has already revealed the truth to me! These people have ulterior motives, Serval. They want to steal this treasure from the Architects.

t_ch: 守护者大人一早提醒过我，你异想天开，触碰禁忌的知识，会给贝洛伯格带来灾祸…但我相信你，姐姐，我相信你对人民的忠诚！可是……
t_en: The Madam Guardian has warned me before that you were indulging in fantasy, that you'd been exposed to forbidden knowledge, and that you would bring destruction down upon Belobog... I believe you, Serval, I believe you think you're acting with loyalty to the people! It's just...

t_ch: 铁卫，列队！捉住他们。裂界怪物随时可能进犯，没有时间浪费在这群人身上！
t_en: Guards, formation! Arrest these people. We could be inundated with Fragmentum monsters at any moment, we have no time to waste on them!

t_ch: 禁忌之所以为禁忌，正是因为真相隐藏其中。
t_en: The forbidden is only forbidden to conceal the truth within.

t_ch: 可可利亚害怕我们掌握这些知识，她畏惧真相大白于天下——为了拯救世界，我们只好孤注一掷。
t_en: Cocolia's afraid that we'll seize on this knowledge — that the truth will spread far and wide: To save the world, we must risk it all.

t_ch: 好了，我要解释的就这么多！至于你信不信，才不关我事！反正老姐我一直都这么任性。遇到讨厌的事或人就要站起来反抗…该坚持的事就绝对要坚持到底！
t_en: I've said my piece, whether you believe it or not is up to you. Regardless, you should know by now your sister's never been one to back down. If there's something or someone you can't abide, you should stand up and resist... and if there's something you uphold, you should uphold it to the very end!

t_ch: 说得好啊，姐姐！
t_en: Well said, Serval!

t_ch: 三思吧，杰帕德！
t_en: Think thrice, Gepard!

t_ch: 你的智取就这？！
t_en: What happened to brainwaves!?

t_ch: 将你的解释留给审判官吧。现在，我以戍卫官的身份，下令捉拿破坏铁卫禁区的犯人！
t_en: Save your explanation for the judge. You are charged with sabotaging the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone. In my capacity as captain, I hereby order that these fugitives be arrested!

t_ch: 这不是小时候的打闹游戏了，姐姐。我不会手下留情的！
t_en: This isn't like our childhood games, Serval. You won't get any leniency from me.

t_ch: 「壁垒」的故障还没修好呢，别大言不惭了，弟弟！
t_en: The Barrier hasn't been fixed yet. Don't try and be a hero, Gepard!

t_ch: …唉，我就说凡是要交涉的情节，最后都会开打吧！
t_en: ...Ugh, didn't I tell you? All our negotiations end in combat!

t_ch: 清醒一点吧，姐姐！你忘记自己立下的「存护誓言」了吗？
t_en: Come to your senses, Serval! Did you forget your Oath of Preservation?

t_ch: 记性变差了啊，老弟？你忘了「筑城者」老早就把我开除了吗！
t_en: So much for your memory. Did you forget the Architects expelled me ages ago?

t_ch: 把你们带入贝洛伯格…是我犯下的过错。
t_en: Bringing you to Belobog... was a grave error.

t_ch: 这个错误就由我来纠正！
t_en: An error only I can rectify!

t_ch: 呼…呼……
这家伙…好扛打啊。我从没遇到过这么顽强的对手！
t_en: This guy... knows how to put up a fight. I've never come up against anyone this relentless!

t_ch: 哈…好像怎么都打不倒他……
t_en: Phew... he just won't go down...

t_ch: 因为他是个一根筋！辩论也好打架也罢，只要他认定了一件事，是死也不会让步的…所以才不可爱啊，这家伙！
t_en: He's as stubborn as I am. It could be an argument or a fight — he'll do both to the death... That's why he bugs the heck out of me!

t_ch: 差不多了吧，杰帕德！看看你周围，只剩你还站着了！
t_en: That's enough, Gepard. Take a look around you! You're the last man standing!

t_ch: …就算只有我一个人，我也不会屈服……
t_en: ...Even if I am, I won't yield...

t_ch: 不需要你的屈服。
t_en: We don't need you to yield.

t_ch: 拜托你快屈服吧。
t_en: Please yield already.

t_ch: 谁来智取一下？
t_en: Brainwaves? Anyone?

t_ch: 我们并非要以武力镇服你，那样的服从毫无意义。
t_en: We don't want you to yield through force of arms. That wouldn't be a victory for us.

t_ch: 是啊，我们的目的和你、希露瓦、布洛妮娅明明是一致的呀，都是要「存护」这个世界！根本没有敌对的理由好嘛！
t_en: Yeah, our goal is the same as yours, Serval's, and Bronya's — we just want to preserve this world! There's no reason to turn against each other!

t_ch: 杰帕德…老弟，到了这份上，你也该懂得变通一下了吧？
t_en: Gepard... brother. Surely now you can see the need for pragmatism?

t_ch: 就算你不相信这些外来的朋友，也该相信我——呃，可能姐姐我确实把你的信任都消磨光了——那就至少，相信布洛妮娅吧。
t_en: Even if you don't believe my outsider friends, you should believe me... Ugh, maybe I've wasted your trust... in which case, believe Bronya.

t_ch: …布洛妮娅小姐？
t_en: ...Lady Bronya?

t_ch: 你们将所知道的一切告知杰帕德，并交出了布洛妮娅的信件。
t_en: You tell Gepard everything you know and show him Bronya's letter.

t_ch: 该说的都说了，老弟，该怎么做你自己决定吧。
t_en: There's nothing more to say, Gepard. The decision is yours.

t_ch: 我是银鬃铁卫的戍卫官，职责所在，必须执行「大守护者」的命令。
t_en: As a captain of the Silvermane Guards, I am duty-bound to carry out the orders of the Supreme Guardian.

t_ch: 你要不再好好想想…
t_en: Final answer...?

t_ch: 还是我们替你决定吧。
t_en: We could decide for you.

t_ch: 好啊，我还没打够呢！
t_en: Fine! I've still got fight in me.

t_ch: ——但布洛妮娅小姐是前线实际上的指挥官。根据军规，当前线指挥与后方筑城者的指令发生冲突时，应原地等待进一步的指令。
t_en: But... Lady Bronya is the commanding officer for the front lines. According to military protocol, if the front line directives of the commanding officer clash with those of the Architects behind the lines, a soldier must remain at their post and await further directives.

t_ch: 谢谢你的理解。
t_en: Thanks for understanding.

t_ch: 情商终于上线了？
t_en: Is this a brainwave? This feels like a brainwave.

t_ch: 好小子，被你玩明白了。
t_en: Nice interpretation of the rules, dude.

t_ch: 对银鬃铁卫而言，守护者的命令是至高、绝对的。但在誓言里，还有一样东西和她的命令同等重要……
t_en: For the Silvermane Guards, the guardian's orders are paramount and absolute. But there is something of equal importance in the oath we take...

t_ch: …贝洛伯格的人民。
t_en: ...The people of Belobog.

t_ch: 失去了人民，铁卫的意义也就不复存在。与裂界怪物的作战是为了「存护」，但和你们的战斗…我现在不明白它的意义。
t_en: If we lose the people, we lose the reason for our existence. Our fight with the Fragmentum monsters is for the sake of preservation, but our fight with you... I fail to see the purpose.

t_ch: 如果你们真的能阻止不断膨胀的灾难，那贝洛伯格的所有人都欠你们一份感激。
t_en: If you are truly able to prevent our endlessly unfolding misfortunes, then the people of Belobog are indebted to you.

t_ch: 但如果你们是在用一层又一层的谎言粉饰真实目的，利用布洛妮娅和姐姐…我对克里珀发誓，一定会毫不留情地制裁你们。
t_en: But if you are using lies to mask your true intentions, using my sister and Bronya for your own ends... I swear by Qlipoth that I will carry out your punishment without an ounce of mercy.

t_ch: 他们没有说谎，我向你保证。
t_en: They're not lying, I promise you.

t_ch: 你就是希儿？身手不错，但不像是铁卫的战法。
t_en: You must be Seele? You are a skilled fighter... your combat style is nothing like that of the Guards.

t_ch: 不管你信不信，这些人的确帮了下层区很大的忙，很多人都愿意为他们做担保。
t_en: Regardless of what you believe, these guys have been a great help to the Underworld. Many people would vouch for them.

t_ch: …我知道了。
t_en: ...I'm sure.

t_ch: 想继续向北方进发，要穿过一整片完全被侵蚀的裂界，才能到达另一头的雪原。
t_en: If you want to advance further northward, you must traverse an area entirely corroded by the Fragmentum. It's the only way to get to the Snow Plains on the other side.

t_ch: 在下一拨袭击到来之前，铁卫还能争取一些时间。
t_en: The Guards can give you some time before the next wave of attacks is upon us.

t_ch: 看吧！轻轻松松。
t_en: See! That was easy.

t_ch: 不愧是「杰帕德的姐姐」……
t_en: You're Gepard's sister alright...

t_ch: 我可不想被人看成「杰帕德的姐姐」…这次是为了你们，否则我才不想借老弟的名字。
t_en: Hmph, I don't want people to see me that way... I'm doing this for you. Otherwise, I wouldn't be using my brother's name.

t_ch: 杰帕德经常在前线值勤吗？
t_en: Is Gepard on front line duty a lot?

t_ch: 对，怎么突然问这个？
t_en: Yes, but what made you ask that all of a sudden?

t_ch: 这么危险，你不会替他担心嘛？
t_en: It's so dangerous, don't you worry about him?

t_ch: 他是朗道家的人。
t_en: He's a Landau.

t_ch: 真没想到，你和杰帕德居然是姐弟？
t_en: I never would've guessed that Gepard and you were brother and sister.

t_ch: 的确，我俩的性格跟兴趣喜好都完全不一样。
t_en: I can't say I blame you — we're nothing alike in personality or interests.

t_ch: 朗道家世代从军，很多人都英年早逝了，不大有时间留给兄弟姐妹。每个人只是努力过好自己的一生。
t_en: In our family we have a strong military tradition going back generations — many a Landau has died in their prime. There's not a lot of "brother and sister time." Everyone just does their best to get on with their life.

t_ch: 希露瓦，那个什么邓恩，你认识？
t_en: Serval, this Dunn, do you know him?

t_ch: 那可不吗，老熟人了。他挺好说话的，看我来说服他。
t_en: You bet I do. We go way back. He's easy to talk to. Watch me persuade him.

t_ch: 早知道「密钥」就在他身上…我一个人潜进去拿走就好了。
t_en: If I'd known he had the encryption key from the start, I could've snuck in and taken it off him myself.

t_ch: 别马后炮了，希儿姑娘！只要机械栈桥启动，咱们迟早都要暴露的。
t_en: Shoulda, coulda, woulda, Seele! Activating the gear bridge alone would've been enough to expose us.

t_ch: 搞定！
t_en: We're in!

t_ch: 门开了！谢啦邓恩！
t_en: It's open! Oh, thank you, thank you, thank you, Dunn!

t_ch: 那个，希露瓦…就算咱们通过了栈桥，对面不还有更多铁卫守着？
t_en: Um, Serval... won't more Silvermane Guards be waiting for us on the other side of the gear bridge?

t_ch: 对，没错。
t_en: Yup.

t_ch: 那怎么办呀！
t_en: Then what's our plan!?

t_ch: 要么一路冲过封锁线，要么以理服人——随机应变！
t_en: Well, either we reason with them or charge straight through the blockade... Let's play it by ear!
Uhh...

t_ch: 下次冒险之前，咱可得好好跟姬子姐姐请教下谈判技巧。总靠打架解决问题，也太不符合少女的优雅了吧！
t_en: Before our next expedition, I need Himeko to teach me some negotiation skills. Beating people up all the time is cramping my elegance!

t_ch: 老弟入伍后，我就没再跟他打过架了。小的时候他可打不过我，现在嘛……
t_en: I haven't fought with Gepard since he enlisted. He could never beat me when we were little, but now...

t_ch: 你们，站住！
t_en: You, hold it right there!

t_ch: 前方是军事重地，临时工不许进入！
t_en: This is a military base. Temporary workers aren't allowed in.

t_ch: 你看，姐弟间的矛盾就是这样，痛快打上一架之后就和好如初啦。
t_en: You see? Brothers and sisters need to have a scrap once in a while to get back on good terms.

t_ch: 抱歉，把你卷进来。
t_en: Sorry for getting you involved in this.

t_ch: 别这么说，你再道歉，我的耳朵都要起茧了。
t_en: Agh, enough apologizing. My ears can't take any more.

t_ch: 要我说，这都是迟早会发生的事。你们只是给了我一个提前行动起来的理由罢了。
t_en: Honestly, this would have happened sooner or later. You just gave me an excuse to bring everything forward.

t_ch: 这就是亲姐弟的相处方式？
t_en: So this is how brothers and sisters normally coexist?

t_ch: 怎么？真刀真枪地下狠手，亲姐弟之间难道不该这么相处吗？
t_en: What's wrong with a bit of violent coexistence between siblings? Seems pretty normal to me.

t_ch: 嘿，开个玩笑。离开部队后的这些年，我跟老弟间的谈话总会刻意避开一些敏感话题。现在想想，也许是他为了顾及我的感受，一直默默地护着我呢。
t_en: Hehe, I'm pulling your leg. Since I left the military, my brother and I have always steered clear of certain sensitive topics... Thinking about it, perhaps he's just been looking out for my feelings, shielding me all along.

t_ch: 以我这脾气，老弟肯定没少替我操心。还真是辛苦他啦。
t_en: Knowing my temper, my brother almost certainly went to great lengths on many occasions for me. I should be thanking him.

t_ch: 接下来就该寻找「星核」了。
t_en: Let the Stellaron hunt begin.

t_ch: 没错，「星核」虽然和我素未谋面，但是我却因为它丢了筑城者的铁饭碗，是时候去找它算账了。
t_en: Let's do this. I may never have come face to face with it, but this Stellaron cost me a nice, stable job. It's time to get even.

t_ch: 其实我还有另一个私心——我想向可可利亚证明我是对的。等我们解决了「星核」这个麻烦…也许她就能变回原来的样子？
t_en: Actually, I have another selfish motive... I want to prove to Cocolia that I was right. Once we've taken care of the Stellaron... maybe she'll go back to how she was.

t_ch: 嗐，现在说这些有点不合时宜了，你别介意。
t_en: ...Sorry, hardly the time for me to be obsessing over all this.

t_ch: 放心，交给我们吧。
t_en: We've got this.

t_ch: 想继续向北方前进的话，就必须穿过那片「地狱」。不过换个角度想想…对咱们来说，那里更像彰显实力的舞台吧？
t_en: As I mentioned, if we want to progress further north, we're gonna have to cross that "hell." Still, look at it this way: Just another arena to showcase our skills, right?

t_ch: 准备好了就登台吧，我们一起完成这场演出！
t_en: Now, if you're ready to get on stage, let's push for that standing ovation!

t_ch: 必须得承认，我之前对银鬃铁卫的误解太深。他们每天也在为了生存而战，跟「地火」一样。
t_en: I gotta admit, I had a lot of... misunderstandings... about the Silvermane Guards. They're fighting for survival here every day, just like Wildfire.

t_ch: 区别在于，我们在为了自己的自由抗争，而他们…他们只是在执行命令。
t_en: The difference is we're making a stand for freedom... while they're just carrying out orders.

t_ch: 所以我们才要换位思考。
t_en: That's why we have to try and put ourselves in their shoes.

t_ch: 「换位思考」…说着轻巧。人人都有自己的苦衷，但是如果互相之间连面都见不上，还提什么相互理解？
t_en: Put ourselves in their shoes... Easier said than done. Everyone has their struggles, but how can we understand them if we can't even see each other?

t_ch: 你理解布洛妮娅的苦衷了吗？
t_en: Do you understand Bronya's struggles?

t_ch: 当然，早就理解了。不过依我看，她需要的不是别人的理解，而是迈过自己心里的那道坎。
t_en: Of course I do, I've understood them for a while now. But as far as I can tell, she doesn't need other people's understanding. She needs to understand her own heart.

t_ch: …就跟那个杰帕德一样。我能看出来——他刚才下了很大的决心才放下武器。
t_en: ...It's the same with Gepard. I could tell it took a lot for him to lay down his arms.

t_ch: 该去结束这一切了。
t_en: It's time to finish this.

t_ch: 我好像已经听到风暴的声音了，从这城墙外传来的…让人平静不下来。
t_en: I think I can already hear the storm on the other side of the city walls... Not a reassuring sound.

t_ch: 希望希露瓦没说错…但愿那个疯子守护者不会伤害布洛妮娅。
t_en: I hope Serval's right... That supreme lunatic better not have harmed Bronya.

t_ch: 禁区的大门一旦打开，另一头的怪物就会倾巢出动。银鬃铁卫能做到的，就是尽量拖住敌人，给你们争取一些时间。
t_en: As soon as the restricted zone gate is open, the monsters on the other side will turn out in full force. The Guards will do their best to stall them and buy you some time.

t_ch: 一旦你们突破了前线…我们就再帮不上什么忙了。北方的裂界里究竟是怎样的景象，只能由各位自己一探究竟。
t_en: Once you've broken through the front line... there's nothing more we can do for you. You'll have to find out for yourselves what lies within the northern Fragmentum.

t_ch: 所以…你们下定决心了吗？
t_en: So... have you made up your minds?

t_ch: 我们准备好了。
t_en: We're ready.

t_ch: 再给我们点时间…
t_en: Give us a moment...

t_ch: 我明白了。握紧武器，这肯定会是一场恶战。
t_en: Understood. Keep your weapons close. This will be a fierce fight.

t_ch: 铁卫！听我命令——打开大门！
t_en: Guards! Open the gate!

t_ch: 你们每天都在面对这种攻势吗？
t_en: Are you dealing with attacks like this every day?

t_ch: 司空见惯了。
t_en: It's a common occurrence.

t_ch: 银鬃铁卫，列队！
t_en: Guards, formation!

t_ch: 哼，我可不想欠铁卫的人情！
t_en: Hmph, well I'm gonna make sure I don't owe the Guards any favors when this is done!

t_ch: 上吧，为了布洛妮娅！
t_en: For Bronya!

t_ch: 上吧，为了贝洛伯格！
t_en: For Belobog!

t_ch: 上吧，为了宇宙和平！
t_en: For universal peace!

t_ch: 它们要攻过来了！
t_en: Here they come!

t_ch: ——准备御敌！
t_en: Steel yourselves!

t_ch: 这帮家伙…真是没完没了呀！
t_en: ...How many of them are there!?

t_ch: 数量再多也只是杂碎而已——别退后！
t_en: The more the merrier, these guys are nothing! Hold the line!

t_ch: 唔…
t_en: Argh...

t_ch: …早说过了，杰帕德！「壁垒」还没修好，不要逞强！
t_en: ...I told you, Gepard, the Barrier hasn't been fixed yet! Don't try and be a hero!
